form.title: Meal Production
form.description: Capture data of the Meal Production process

helperText.en: Pick a date for which you want to see meal production information.

checkingMessage.en: Do not leave this page while we check for duplicate

message.en: Leftover availability changed review new availability before continuing
Confirm that all leftovers have been recorded and will be labelled and stored according to storage procedure.
Keep this screen open until the Leftover ID is generated.
Please confirm there is no leftover.
Use the ID and name below to label each leftover container for easy identification later.

itemTemplate.en: {{LEFTOVER_ID}} | {{LEFTOVER_RECIPE || LEFTOVER_INGREDIENT || LEFTOVER_KIND}} | {{LEFTOVER_PORTIONS | pluralize:portion:portions || LEFTOVER_QTY | appendField:LEFTOVER_UNIT}} | {{LEFTOVER_EXP_DATE | date:dd-MMM-yyyy | label:Expires}}

message.en: Keep this screen open until no leftovers statement is recorded.

Select a new production date (today or later) to copy this record. Customer, service, responsible cook, ordered portions, and recipes will be copied automatically. Leftovers used, ingredient changes, photos, food safety, portioning, and leftovers recorded will not be copied.
This meal production record is incomplete because customer, production date, or service is missing. Leaving now will permanently delete this record. This cannot be undone.
Ingredients receipt photos, food safety, portioning, and leftovers can only be recorded on the production date.
Ingredients receipt photos, food safety, portioning, and leftovers can only be recorded on the production date.
Please wait while your photos finish uploading.

helpText.en: Customer, date, and service must be selected to create a meal production record.

helperText.en:
Skip this page if not using leftovers.
Tick the box to use leftovers and adjust quantity if needed.
For multi-ingredient leftovers, select Combine or Reheat.
Single-ingredient leftovers are combined by default.
To remove leftovers, adjust quantity or untick the box.

message.en: Leftover availability changed review new availability before continuing
Enter a value between 1 and the maximum available. To use none, deselect this leftover.
Enter a value between 1 and {MAX_AVAILABLE}. To use none, deselect this leftover.
Enter a value between 1 and {MAX_AVAILABLE}. To use none, deselect this leftover.
Select Combine or Reheat

emptyStateMessage.en: No compatible leftovers are available for the current dishes.

helpText.en:
Review and update recipe ingredients for today’s dish based on ingredient availability and selected leftovers.
Reduce recipe ingredients if you combine leftovers.
Cook only the stated “To cook” portions using listed ingredients and quantities.
Upload ingredient receipt photos before cooking.
Reheat or combine leftovers as selected.
Follow cooking and portioning instructions.

body.en: One or more ingredients do not have a quantity and/or unit. If you close this page now, the ingredient selection will be lost.

helperText.en: Review recipe ingredients for today's dish. Tap ✏️ to adjust ingredients if needed.
Adjust ingredients to match today’s dish. Add, update, or remove ingredients as needed. At least one ingredient must remain.

changeDialog.title: Change recipe?
changeDialog.message: Changing the recipe now will permanently delete all data and photos captured in later steps. This cannot be undone.

helpText.en: Before portioning, confirm all pots reached at least 63°C and add one photo for each pot.

message.en:
Confirm that {MP_SERVICE} for {MP_DISTRIBUTOR} on {MP_PREP_DATE} has been produced by {MP_COOK_NAME} in line with the Meal Production procedure and hygiene rules.

All ordered portions are ready for delivery and Final report can be created.
Do not leave this screen while we create and send the report.
Record any leftovers before completing this meal production. If there are none, click Complete.

helpText.en: Update the number of portions delivered to reflect reality. You must deliver at least the ordered number of portions.

overlayContextHeader.en: Deselect any ingredient not included in this leftover and click save.

helperText.en:
Leave empty if there are no leftovers, then click Complete.
To record multi-ingredient leftovers, enter a value > 0. Rename if needed and deselect ingredients not included.
Tick ❄️ if freezing (expiry: +3 months). Leave unticked for refrigerated storage (expiry: 3 days).
To record single-ingredient leftovers, follow instructions at the bottom of the page otherwise click Complete to generate the Leftover ID.

To add single-ingredient leftovers (e.g. rice, bulgur, couscous, chickpeas), search and select the ingredient, then enter the quantity and unit.
Tick ❄️ if freezing.  Leave unticked for refrigerated storage.
Click Complete to generate the Leftover ID.

intro.en: A meal production record already exists for this customer, service, and date. What do you want to do?

pipelines.title: Ingredients used
pipelines.description: Select a start date. We’ll email the list of ingredients used since then.

ui.queuedNotice: Report request sent. We'll email it to the Operations Manager.

email.subject: Ingredients used report since {{START_DATE}}
email.message: Please find attached the Ingredients used report since {{START_DATE}}.

pipelines.title: Meals produced and delivered
pipelines.description: Select a start date. We’ll email the list of completed meals since then.

ui.queuedNotice: Report request sent. We'll email it to the Operations Manager.

email.subject: Meals produced and delivered report since {{START_DATE}}
email.message: Please find attached the Meals produced and delivered report since {{START_DATE}}.

attachment.fileNameTemplate: Meals produced and delivered report since {{START_DATE}}.xlsx

pipelines.title: Leftover generation
pipelines.description: Select a start date. We’ll email the list of generated leftovers since then.

ui.queuedNotice: Report request sent. We'll email it to the Operations Manager.

email.subject: Leftover generation report since {{START_DATE}}
email.message: Please find attached the Leftover generation report since {{START_DATE}}.

pipelines.title: Meal productions with incomplete status
pipelines.description: Select a start date. We’ll email the list of incomplete meal productions since then.

ui.queuedNotice: Report request sent. We'll email it to the Operations Manager.

email.subject: Meal productions with incomplete status report since {{START_DATE}}
email.message: Please find attached the Meal productions with incomplete status report since {{START_DATE}}.

attachment.fileNameTemplate: Meal productions with incomplete status report since {{START_DATE}}.xlsx

pipelines.title: Cleaning and storage checks
pipelines.description: Select a start date. We’ll email the list of checks since then.

ui.queuedNotice: Report request sent. We'll email it to the Operations Manager.

email.subject: Cleaning and storage checks report since {{START_DATE}}
email.message: Please find attached the Cleaning and storage checks report since {{START_DATE}}.

attachment.fileNameTemplate: Cleaning and storage checks report since {{START_DATE}}.xlsx

message.en: Changing customer will delete all data and photos captured in later steps. This cannot be undone.
Changing service will delete all data and photos captured in later steps. This cannot be undone.
Past dates are not allowed. Select today or a future date.
Changing production date will delete all data and photos captured in later steps. This cannot be undone.

questions.qEn: Are there leftovers not shipped to the client?

message.en: Enter a valid whole number without leading zeros.
Select the leftover recipe.
Enter a whole number greater than 0.
Select how this leftover will be stored.

helperText.en: Search ingredients

message.en: Enter a quantity greater than 0.
Select a unit.
Enter the quantity for each leftover ingredient.
Select the unit for each leftover ingredient.

helperText.en: Enter the number of portions.

message.en: Enter a whole number
Ordered portions must be 0 or more
Reducing ordered portions to 0 will delete corresponding dietary category data. This cannot be undone.

requiredMessage.en: Delivered portions must be equal to or greater than ordered portions.

message.en: Enter a valid whole number without leading zeros.
Delivered portions must be equal to or greater than ordered portions.
Enter a valid whole number without leading zeros.
Enter a whole number greater than 0 when leftovers are present.
Select how this leftover will be stored.
Select a recipe

changeDialog.title: Change recipe?
changeDialog.message: Changing the recipe will permanently delete all data and photos captured in later steps. This cannot be undone.

needsAttentionMessage.en: Each ingredient must have a quantity and a unit.

helperText.en: Adjust ingredients to match today’s dish. Add, update, or remove ingredients as needed. At least one ingredient must remain.
Review recipe ingredients for today's dish. Tap ✏️ to adjust ingredients if needed.

message.en: Enter the quantity
Select a unit

needsAttentionMessage.en: Each ingredient must have a quantity and a unit.

helperText.en: Search and select ingredients to adjust today’s dish recipe.

searchHelperText.en: Enter exact ingredient name (example: tomato, not tom).

message.en: At least one ingredient must remain.
{value} is already on the list. Update the existing quantity instead of adding a new line
At least one field must be greater than 0

helperText.en: Use "Ingredients needed" as the reference shopping list
Upload up to 10 photos max 10 Mb each

maxFiles.en: The maximum number of photos is {max}

maxFileSizeMb.en: The selected photo(s) exceed the {mb}MB limit. Please take other photo(s) using normal camera mode (avoid zoom, no filters, no HD mode).

maxFilesPartial.en: Maximum 10 photos allowed. Extra selected photos were not added. Please review your photos

remainingOne.en: You need to add {count} more photo

remainingMany.en: You need to add {count} more photos

discardChangesConfirm.en: The photos you changed are not saved yet. Close without saving them?

save.en: Do not leave the screen while we save your photo(s)

removeSelected.en: Do not leave the screen while we remove selected photo(s)

requiredMessage.en: Confirm that all pots reached at least 63°C.

message.en: Food safety and portioning can only be recorded on the day of production.

message.en: Food safety and portioning can only be recorded on the day of production.

Saving…
Do not leave this page while we save the selected date
Remember to indicate this new expiration date on individual portion containers.

Lock order details?
Customer, date, service, responsible cook, and ordered portions cannot be changed after this step.

cancelLabel.en: No, do not lock order details

message.en: Unlocking record will allow any user to edit Order information. Do you wish to continue?
